AEMEATH_ENERGY_COUNT.title: Energy
AEMEATH_ENERGY_COUNT.description: Your current Energy ({singleEnergyIcon}) count. Cards require {singleEnergyIcon} to play, shown in the top-left corner.

AEMEATH_SYNC_COUNT.title: Sync Rate
AEMEATH_SYNC_COUNT.description: Your current Sync ({singleSyncIcon}) count. Some Aemeath cards require {singleSyncIcon} to play.
